title: Exploration Galore
description: Discover endless adventures with the Exploration Galore modpack, packed with new content to enhance exploration!
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4aecfb10d583d1c19e95c3f74ff079fa58fc5d17.png)

\
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9f04e4c0fbe11b93d9a36cf2f8ce53af71a1d48.png)


⛰️ Beautiful and Amplified World Generation, for Overworld, Nether and End

⚙️ Optimisation Mods to Speed Up Minecraft and Boost FPS (**Shaders Supported**)

🏰 Overhauled Stronghold & Nether Fortresses

🏠 Hundreds of New Dungeons, Structures, Villages and Towns

✈️ Includes Ships and Aircraft for Faster Travel 

✨ Countless Stunning Particles and Animations to Enhance Visuals

🍔 New Food Content Items to Discover, Found in All 3 Dimensions

🗺️ Increased Awareness of Surroundings with Xaero's Minimap and World Map

🌍 Built-in Online World Hosting for Playing with Friends

⭐ 100+ Mods to Improve the Exploration Experience!

\
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be4557b86485007fa7b54b98320f4ebce6420139.png)

**Minimum:**

OS: Windows 10 | MacOS 10.14

Processor: Intel Core i3-4170 3.7 GHz | AMD A10-6800K APU 4.1 GHz | Apple M1
 
Memory: 8 GB RAM Total, 3 GB RAM Allocated
 
Graphics: GT 1030 / RX 550 / Apple M1 GPU

**Warnings:**

- If 3GB of memory is not allocated, the game may not start!
- Using shaders may require higher graphics capability!
- Only use shaders from this list, which are compatible with Distant Horizons mod: https://gist.github.com/Steveplays28/52db568f297ded527da56dbe6deeec0e
